results.name: Page loads with persistent Federation navigation
Idle contributor view and ledger copy
Task choice card only appears when work is available
Help keeps the safety boundary available in-app
Requester form keeps its values and an inline submit error across polling, then clears the error on edit
Activity and Settings render complete requester history and the cached identity
Settings shows a provider-start failure in the page instead of surfacing a transport error
Contribution controls require a consented task without mutating the rig
Active contribution polls preserve a text selection for over ten seconds
Requester task detail renders the bounded execution transcript
Expired sessions stop polling after two unauthorized status responses
No console errors on any Federation view
